scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "bash -c 'cd backend && .venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000'"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run install:frontend && bash -c 'cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt'
